description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in PHP Newsfeed 20040723 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) name parameter to (a) deltables.php, (2) select, (3) header, (4) url, (5) source, or (6) time parameters to (b) manualsubmit.php, (7) num parameter to (c) delete.php, or (8) tablename parameter to (d) searchnews.php.
